zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前价格约9.36，整体震荡偏强。位于20日均线9.176上方，短线反弹后整理，高低点收敛，情绪中性偏多。

P2：MACD 0.0598维持正值，多头动能尚存但不强。价格依托均线上方运行，趋势偏多但缺乏加速，需观察量能变化。

P3：支撑9.33-9.30，失守看9.176均线；阻力9.41前高，突破或上看9.50，当前维持区间震荡。

P4：策略以区间为主，突破9.42顺势做多，止损9.30下方；受阻可高抛低吸，严格控制仓位风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is trading near 9.36 after a modest daily decline, with price action remaining relatively stable despite mild selling pressure. The market continues to hold above the 20-day simple moving average at 9.18, suggesting short-term bullish structure remains intact. Buyers appear willing to defend dips near the recent low of 9.33, while upside momentum has slowed beneath the 9.42 intraday high. The broader tone is cautiously constructive, although conviction remains limited without stronger volume expansion.

Technical indicators lean slightly positive. The MACD reading at 0.0598 reflects fading but still favorable momentum, indicating the market has not fully transitioned into bearish territory. While the RSI reading is unavailable, the current positioning above the SMA(20) implies underlying demand remains supportive in the near term. Traders should monitor whether price can maintain closes above 9.30, as a breakdown below that zone could weaken sentiment and trigger a deeper retracement toward previous consolidation areas.

Immediate resistance is developing around 9.42, followed by a stronger psychological barrier near 9.50. A sustained breakout above these levels could open room for a recovery toward the 9.70–10.00 region. On the downside, initial support sits near 9.33, with stronger structural support closer to the SMA(20) around 9.18. If sellers push below that moving average, bearish momentum may accelerate toward the 9.00 handle, where buyers would likely attempt to stabilize the market.

Short-term traders may favor a cautious bullish bias while price remains above 9.18, particularly on confirmed rebounds from support. Momentum entries are more attractive only if AVAX/USD breaks decisively above 9.42 with increased participation. Conservative participants may prefer waiting for clearer directional confirmation before increasing exposure. Risk management remains essential, as the narrow trading range suggests the market could experience a volatility expansion once either support or resistance gives way.
